series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, applications, Division memorandum or correspondence associated with an Ohio land professional application.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records are imaged and indexed upon Division receipt. Upon confirmation that imaging and indexing were properly completed, then paper records may be destroyed by recycling. ; Electronic: Any records maintained in machine readable format are to be retained 5 years from the date of receipt by the Division and then deleted. ; Microform: Any microfiche records are to be retained 5 years from the date of receipt by the Division and then recycled., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Recycle
